# Mainframe Production Support Test

iMocha’s Mainframe production support test is the preferred pre-employment test for recruiters and hiring managers to hire job-fit candidates for roles such as Mainframe Developer, Mainframe Consultant, and Mainframe Production Support Engineer. Our Mainframe support online test has helped our customers to reduce hiring costs by 40%.

## Mainframe Production Support Online Skills Test

Mainframe production support test helps recruiters & hiring managers to effectively assess the production support skills of candidates before an interview. The mainframe support online test is designed to check the project development, production support, and application skills of the Mainframe Production Support Engineer as per industry standards.

Our Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) design this Mainframe interview test to analyze candidates’ knowledge about Mainframe production support before hiring. Using powerful reporting, you can have a detailed analysis of the test results to help you make a better hiring decision and predict the candidate’s performance.

Blue hollow ring shape above and to the left of a solid orange circle on a white background.

Wondering what other skills we have in our World’s Largest Skills Assessment library?

Visit here

How it works

### Test Summary

Mainframe knowledge test enables employers and recruiters to identify the potential mainframe production support engineer or mainframe consultant by evaluating candidates' working skills and job readiness. For this reason, the emphasis is laid upon evaluating the knowledge of applied skills gained through real work experience.

Mainframe support skills test may contain MCQs (Multiple Choice Questions), MAQs (Multiple Answer Questions), Fill in the Blanks, Whiteboard Questions, Audio / Video Questions, AI-LogicBox, Coding Simulators, True or False Questions, etc.

Useful for hiring 

* Mainframe Developer
* Mainframe Consultant
* Mainframe Production Support Engineer

Topics Covered 

Shuffle

### CA7

iMocha’s Mainframe production support test helps recruiters and hiring managers to evaluate candidates’ understanding of CA-7, a workflow automation software package.

### Ready Queue

Our assessment assesses the candidate’s understanding of CA11, an automated rerun, and tracking system that helps production management.

Shuffle

### JCL Run and Demand Commands

This Mainframe Support online test validates the candidate’s understanding of Job Control Language (JCL), which helps to describe the unit of work in the operating system and demand commands that schedules job immediately at a priority.

Shuffle

### CA11

Our assessment assesses the candidate’s understanding of CA11, an automated rerun, and tracking system that helps production management.

Shuffle
